scripts.build:frontend: cd Frontend && CI= npm run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run smoke:stability
scripts.verify:ci: npm run lint && npm run test:ci && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.verify:tournaments: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run audit:tournaments --workspace backend && npm run preview:reusable-tournaments --workspace backend
scripts.repair:tournaments: npm run fix:tournaments --workspace backend && npm run audit:tournaments --workspace backend
scripts.dev: npm run dev:kill-ports && cd Frontend && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync(require('path').join(process.cwd(),'..','.last-rebuild'), String(Date.now()))" && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 node dist/main.js
scripts.backup-db: cp backend/db.sqlite backend/db.sqlite.backup 2>/dev/null || echo 'База не найдена'
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:kill-ports && cd Frontend && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 CI=true npm run build && cd .. && npx concurrently "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npx wait-on -t 30000 http://localhost:3000 && npm run dev:open"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run dev:kill-ports && cd backend && npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 node dist/main.js
scripts.dev:build: cd Frontend && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 CI=true npm run build
scripts.dev:hot: npm run dev:kill-ports && cd backend && npm run build && npx concurrently "cross-env PORT=3001 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 node dist/main.js" "cd ../Frontend && npm run start"
scripts.dev:live: npm run dev:kill-ports && cd backend && npm run build && cd .. && npx concurrently "sh -c 'cd backend && cross-env PORT=3001 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 node dist/main.js'" "sh -c 'cd Frontend && npm run start'"
scripts.start:simple: npm run dev:kill-ports && cd Frontend && CI= npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync(require('path').join(process.cwd(),'..','.last-rebuild'), String(Date.now()))" && npx concurrently "cross-env PORT=3000 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 node dist/main.js" "npx wait-on -t 120000 http://localhost:3000 && node ../scripts/open-browser.js"
scripts.start:server: cd backend && cross-env PORT=3000 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 node dist/main.js
scripts.dev:auto: npm run dev:kill-ports && cd Frontend && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 CI=true npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync(require('path').join(process.cwd(),'..','.last-rebuild'), String(Date.now()))" && npx concurrently "cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 node dist/main.js" "cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node ../scripts/dev-watch.js"
